what: Snap positioning finalized with three-field model
why: Snap repositioned as 'semantic snapshot — persisted AI thinking'. Field semantics: query (user trigger), title (what was done), summary (why + next steps). Three creation categories: A) no snap for simple Q&A, B) snap with code changes, C) snap without code but with conclusions. Feedback field removed. SKILL.md and cli.md EN/CN fully updated. CLI --query flag for snap create is documented but not yet implemented.
